name: hyperframes-cloudflare-template
description: Preview HTML video compositions in the browser and render MP4s server-side using Cloudflare Workers, Containers, and R2.

RENDER_CONTAINER.description: Container Durable Object hosting Chromium + ffmpeg + hyperframes; receives composition files and returns MP4 bytes.

RENDERS.description: R2 bucket where rendered MP4s are stored. Created automatically on first deploy.

ASSETS.description: Static asset binding for the preview UI and the bundled composition HTML.
